# Overview

Version: 0.1  
Status: active

## Story Metadata

- Story ID: `US-XXX`
- Epic ID: `E##` or `none`
- Status: `planned | in_progress | implemented | changed | blocked | retired`
- Owner: `name or session`

## Current Behavior

Describe current accepted behavior or current repo state before this change.

## Target Behavior

Describe intended behavior after this high-risk story completes.

## Affected Users or Systems

List who or what is affected.

## Affected Product Docs

List exact product or operating docs touched by this work.

## Blast Radius

Describe where failure could show up.

Examples:

- user-facing workflows
- provider boundaries
- data model meaning
- audit or security-sensitive flows

## Non-Goals

State what this packet will not solve.

## Go / No-Go Signal

Describe what would make this story unsafe to continue without revisiting plan.
